item.title: NTFS Data Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS Data Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS Data Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Have you lost your precious data? Don't wait, just click at www.sdcarddatarecovery.org website to download reliable and easy to use Windows NTFS Data Recovery software which is designed to retrieve lost birthday snaps. Professional and innovative file retrieval program is developed to get back all missing, erased data including images, pictures, photos and mp3/mp4 files from damaged hard disk drives.
[read more]

item.title: Shoviv MBOX Converter tool [Email]
item.itunes:title: Shoviv MBOX Converter tool [Email]
item.itunes:author: hannabaker
item.itunes:summary:
Shoviv MBOX Converter tool
(Email)
Shoviv MBOX Converter is a versatile and powerful software designed to streamline the conversion process of MBOX files effortlessly. This tool serves as a comprehensive solution, facilitating the seamless transformation of MBOX files into various file formats like PST, EML, MSG, HTML, and Office 365. Whether you're migrating between email clients or need to extract specific data, this converter ensures precision and reliability.
Its user-friendly interface offers simplicity without compromising on functionality, making it accessible for users with varying technical expertise. With batch conversion capabilities, users can swiftly process multiple MBOX files simultaneously, saving time and effort.

Shoviv MBOX Converter boasts advanced features such as preview options, enabling users to view the contents of MBOX files before conversion, ensuring accuracy and eliminating the risk of data loss or errors. Furthermore, the software preserves the original folder structure and metadata, maintaining data integrity throughout the conversion process.

This tool stands out for its compatibility with multiple email clients like Thunderbird, Apple Mail, Eudora, and more, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a reliable and efficient MBOX file conversion solution. Whether for personal or professional use, Shoviv MBOX Converter offers a seamless and secure way to manage and convert MBOX files.
[read more]

item.title: Photo Recovery Mac Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photo Recovery Mac Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Photo Recovery Mac Software
(Utilities)
Photo Recovery Mac software offers sophisticated feature for users to simply retrieve overall removed or deleted memorable digital pictures, anniversary snapshots, party albums, cute baby birthday video clippings, priceless images, picnic photographs and many other memorable events stored in digital camera storage media. Mac data restoration utility for digital camera facilitates users to restore misplaced valuable data at particular location in Macintosh installed computer system for future usage in simplified manner. Most appropriate Photo Recovery Mac application economically regain entire removed data stored in multiple file extensions including jpeg, png, tiff, mov, midi, exif, gif, tiff, riff, emf, wmf, bmp, mpeg, wav, mpg, jpg, Bitmap and many more. Macintosh data retrieval utility prominently restore picture or images from various types of digital camera including Professional camera, Novelty camera, Digital SLR camera, Point and Shoot camera, Ultra compact digital camera, Digital single lens reflex camera, Compact digital camera, Digital Video camera, Specialty Camera, Prosumer Digital Camera and others. Mac digital camera photo restoration software friendly work with all popular digital camera manufacturing brands including Sony, Casio, Samsung, HP, Nikon, Kingston, Konica-Minolta, Epson, IBM, Philips, Mitsubishi, Fujitsu, Olympus and many others. Features: * Innovative Photo Recovery Mac utility is easy and simple to users and allows users to efficiently regain overall erased or removed valuable digital pictures or images. * Affordable Photo Recovery Mac software enable users to restore unintentionally removed or lost important data erased due to virus or worm infection. * Photo Recovery Mac application facilitates users with enhanced disk scanning methodology which offers users to simply regain entire erased memorable events.

[read more]

item.itunes:summary:

www.sdcarddatarecovery.org website recommends Mac Pictures Recovery software to regain inaccessible picture file, snaps, memorable image, wedding picture, valuable image, priceless snaps and photographs in few easy steps. Mac digital picture restoration tool restores accidentally corrupted data from memory card. Mac image rescue tool repairs erased file which are saved in various file extensions. Mac picture retrieval utility salvage damaged image and picture in simplest way.

item.title: Mac Recovery Photo Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Recovery Photo Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Recovery Photo Software
(Utilities)
Most appropriate Mac Recovery Photo program facilitates user with extraordinary feature to prominently restore overall erased or misplaced valuable data deleted from any type storage media device in comprehensive manner. Mac digital picture restoration software offer users to efficiently retrieve intentionally removed or missed memorable photos or images saved in various file extensions including jpeg, png, tiff, riff, exif, emf, wmf, bmp, tif, gif, Bitmap, PSD, jpg and many others. Best and comprehensive Mac Recovery Photo utility allows users to quickly retrieve misplaced data even error messages of “Drive not detected” or “Drive not formatted” are viewed on computer system desktop. Highly interactive Digital photo restoration software for apple Macintosh enables users to simply regain and restore entire misplaced or lost valuable picture or images erased due to any crucial reasons including human fault, unintentionally deletion of favorite screenshots, Software or hardware malfunction, Corrupted hard disk partitions, virus or worm attack, battery failure, frequently disk format, Formatted or reformatted storage media device, Improper device usage and others. GUI feature enable users to frequently work with software without taking any technical knowledge or professionally expert guidance for operating Mac digital photo restoration utility. Features: * Mac Recovery Photo application allows users to efficiently retrieve overall misplaced or accidentally erased memorable data in just few clicks of mouse. * Innovative Mac Recovery Photo software enable users with advanced disk scanning technique to swiftly recover entire erased valuable pictures or images in simplified manner. * Expertise Mac Recovery Photo program offer users simply get back deleted or erased data without affecting their real quality.

item.itunes:author: sdcardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Company presents Camera Recovery program which is the best way to rescue damaged multimedia pictures, snapshots, audio, video, music files and folders after applying advance disk scanning algorithms on corrupted digital camera storage. Data recovery Program supports all types of jpeg, gif, wmf formats for retrieval of lost files and folders in loss less manner without any degradation in quality and format.

item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: Mac Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Undelete Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Undelete Tool
(Utilities)
Pioneering Mac undelete application uncomplicatedly salvages each accidentally erased data from memory cards with all variety of file extensions for example jpg, midi, wmf, tiff, mpeg, bmp, gif, jpeg, mp4, mp3, emf, avi, wav and many others. Revolutionary memory card data recovery software for Mac OS X is enormously precious to restore mislaid files through whole grouping of memory cards containing compact flash memory card, multimedia card, Micro SD Memory Card, Compact Flash, Mini-SD card, xD Picture card, Memory stick pro, Memory stick pro duo, Memory stick, secure digital cards etc and also tool endorses entire higher capacity memory cards such as 64 MB, 128MB, 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB, 4GB etc. Trustworthy Mac undelete program rapidly restores absolutely corrupted data even after subsequent incidences such as human faults, bad sector in memory drives, unexpected virus or worm infections, fortuitously records deletion, hardware or software malfunctioning, formatted/reformatted memory cards, improper device handling, logical errors in memory cards and more. Innovative memory card data recovery utility for Apple Mac salvages entire vanished records through all principal maker brands of memory cards involving Acer, Nikon, Casio, Samsung, Jet flash, Toshiba, Konica, Hitachi, Pentax, Olympus, Fujitsu and others. Features: * Consistent Mac undelete software does not require any complementary software or hardware for reviving totally ruined video records. * Proficient memory card data recovery program for Mac proffer ultimate feature to show thumbnail preview of intended files earlier than factual recovery. * Graceful Mac undelete application exploits assorted standard or advanced searching algorithms to rescue misplaced terrific celebration images. * Dexterous memory card data recovery tool for Mac keeps pleasant graphical user interface so vital for beginner users to deal with tool with no expert assistance.

[read more]
